# Examples Repo

This page documents the fake repository used for integration scenarios.

Primary source files:

- `tests/integration/fake_repo/src/app/product/use_cases.py`
- `tests/integration/fake_repo/src/app/product/interface.py`
- `tests/integration/fake_repo/src/app/product/model.py`
- `tests/integration/fake_repo/src/config/conf.modules.yaml`
- `tests/integration/fake_repo/src/config/conf.interfaces.yaml`

Purpose:

- Show a full command/model/use-case/interface flow.
- Keep one integration fake repo for executable end-to-end checks.
